title: heliopsis laevis var. gracilis
intro: Heliopsis laevis var. gracilis, also known as smooth oxeye, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family native to North America. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as sore throats, fever, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Heliopsis laevis var. gracilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its herbal uses, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine.
